message:
test: expand E2E, JSON contract, and roundtrip tests for OpenCode provider

Extend the test suite to cover the new OpenCode provider:
- cli_e2e_test.rs: add E2E tests exercising the opc provider alias through
  the CLI, verifying list/resume/convert commands work end-to-end
- json_contract_test.rs: add contract tests ensuring OpenCode sessions
  serialize to the canonical JSON schema correctly
- roundtrip_test.rs: add roundtrip tests verifying OpenCode sessions
  survive write-then-read cycles with full fidelity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
